zh.Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wale: 英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾白 康維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwilym Ap Gruffydd於1360年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾白 康維時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn38歲，母親Generys ferch Madog34歲。他於大約1395年與Morfudd ferch Gronwy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1440年在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾白 康維享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwilym Ap Gruffydd于1360年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾白 康維时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn38岁，母亲Generys ferch Madog34岁。他于大约1395年与Morfudd ferch Gronwy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1440年在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾白 康維享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Gwilym
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwilim
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwillym
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwilym Ap Gruffydd was born in 1360, in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn, was 38 and his mother, Generys ferch Madog, was 34. He married Morfudd ferch Gronwy about 1395. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1440, in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwilym Ap Gruffydd est né en 1360, à Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Generys ferch Madog, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Morfudd ferch Gronwy environ 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1440, à Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwilym Ap Gruffydd 1360 in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn 38 und seine Mutter Generys ferch Madog 34. Er hat um 1395 Morfudd ferch Gronwy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1440 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Morfudd ferch Gronwy circa 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1440, nel Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wale: 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이
ko.lifeSummary: Gwilym Ap Gruffydd(이)가 1360년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Generys ferch Madog(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1395년 Morfudd ferch Gronwy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1440년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wale: пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwilym Ap Gruffydd родился в 1360 г. в местности пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Gwilym of Penrhyn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Generys ferch Madog, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Morfudd ferch Gronwy около 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1440 г. в местности пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.
